name: @intentsolutionsio/wallet-portfolio-tracker
description: Track crypto wallets across multiple chains with portfolio analytics and transaction history

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install wallet-portfolio-tracker\\n  or /plugin install wallet-portfolio-tracker@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
